title: Trigonometry
summary: 9709 P2 trigonometry — identities, equations, and R sin(θ + α) form with GeoGebra unit circle.
learningObjectives: Use compound angle and double angle formulae.
Solve trigonometric equations in a given interval.
Express a sin θ + b cos θ in the form R sin(θ + α).

simpleExplanation.title: P2 trig beyond P1
simpleExplanation.summary: P2 adds compound angles and more complex equations. The R-formula compresses a sin θ + b cos θ into a single sine wave.
steps: sin(A ± B), cos(A ± B) — expand carefully with signs.
Double angle: sin 2A = 2 sin A cos A.
R sin(θ + α): R = √(a² + b²), tan α = b/a (quadrant matters).
General solutions — count roots in [0, 2π) or given range.

sections.content: **P2 Trigonometry** (2.3) builds on **P1 trig** (1.5). Examiners love **identity proofs** — start from the **more complex side**.
